heading: Supplemental grants for additional preventive health services
label: 300n–4a Supplemental grants for additional preventive health services
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1509 of act , was renumbered section 1510 and is classified to .July 1, 1944section 300n–5 of this title

children.text: providing preventive health services in addition to the services authorized in such section, including screenings regarding blood pressure and cholesterol, and including health education;

providing appropriate referrals for medical treatment of women receiving services pursuant to paragraph (1) and ensuring, to the extent practicable, the provision of appropriate follow-up services; and
evaluating activities conducted under paragraphs (1) and (2) through appropriate surveillance or program-monitoring activities.

children.heading: Status as participant in program regarding breast and cervical cancer
children.label: b Status as participant in program regarding breast and cervical cancer
children.text: The Secretary may not make a grant under subsection (a) unless the State involved agrees that services under the grant will be provided only through entities that are screening women for breast or cervical cancer pursuant to a grant under .section 300k of this title

children.heading: Applicability of provisions of general program
children.label: c Applicability of provisions of general program
children.text: This subchapter applies to a grant under subsection (a) to the same extent and in the same manner as such subchapter applies to a grant under .section 300k of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), for the purpose of carrying out this section, there are authorized to be appropriated $3,000,000 for fiscal year 1994, and such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 1995 through 2003.

children.heading: Limitation regarding funding with respect to breast and cervical cancer
children.label: 2 Limitation regarding funding with respect to breast and cervical cancer
children.text: The authorization of appropriations established in paragraph (1) is not effective for a fiscal year unless the amount appropriated under for the fiscal year is equal to or greater than $100,000,000.section 300n–5(a) of this title
